# Dungeons
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Dungeons&prop=wikitext

Dungeons in Revenge of the Fallen hold vital roles in acquiring new and stronger gear. These Dungeons can be sources for various Potions, Quest Chests, and Crates.

<br>
<u>'''Dungeons that are exclusive to Revenge of the Fallen''':</u> 

<u>[[Illusion]]</u>

<u>
[[The Showcase]]</u>

<u>
[[Galaxy|Galaxies]]</u>

[[Asgard]]

[[Tomb of Decaying Death]]

[[Twilight Necropolis]]

[[Icy Peaks]]

[[Scorched Plains]]
